overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from a cinematic video game depicting a snowy Viking settlement. The player character walks through wooden longhouses along a waterfront, approaching a massive beached whale where a woman prepares food, before examining the whale's details and returning to the village view.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the snowy village, passing wooden longhouses and scaffolding structures

notable_agents.action: villager in dark clothing walking ahead on the path

entered.detail: large traditional wooden longhouse with snow-covered roof and scaffolding
wooden pole scaffolding structure alongside the main building
vertical wooden posts marking the path boundary
snow-covered mountain range visible in the background haze

segments.scene_description: Walking through a snowy Viking settlement with traditional wooden longhouses and scaffolding. The ground is covered in patches of snow and dirt, with the sun creating bright lens flares against the blue winter sky.

events.description: massive beached whale comes into view on the right side as the camera approaches the waterfront
camera slows and turns to focus on the woman working at the table beside the whale

agents.ego_description: walking toward the waterfront and slowing down to observe the whale and the woman working beside it

notable_agents.action: woman preparing food in a bowl at a wooden table next to the whale

entered.detail: massive gray whale carcass beached on the wooden dock, covered in snow
partially frozen body of water with ice formations along the shore
simple wooden table with bowls and food preparation items

segments.scene_description: Approaching the waterfront where a massive beached whale dominates the right side of the frame. A woman works at a wooden table beside the whale, preparing food in bowls, with the frozen lake and distant snow-covered mountains visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: beached whale examination and village waterfront

events.description: camera moves to extreme close-up of the whale's textured skin and baleen plates
camera pulls back from the whale and pans left to reveal the wider settlement

agents.ego_description: examining the whale's details up close, then turning to survey the wider settlement area

notable_agents.action: group of villagers walking through the settlement near a wooden crane structure

entered.detail: tall wooden A-frame crane structure used for hauling boats or cargo
cluster of traditional wooden longhouses in the background

segments.scene_description: Examining the whale's textured skin and jaw in extreme close-up, then pulling back to reveal the wider settlement with wooden crane structures and other villagers walking through the snowy village paths.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a snowy Viking settlement that transitions from a village walk into an intimate examination of a beached whale. It begins by weaving through traditional wooden longhouses and scaffolding, where bright lens flares cut through a crisp blue winter sky over patches of snow and dirt. As the camera reaches the waterfront, the view opens up to reveal a massive beached whale dominating the landscape while a woman prepares food at a nearby wooden table against a backdrop of frozen lakes and distant mountains. The perspective then shifts into an extreme close-up to examine the textured skin and jaw of the creature before pulling back to reveal the wider settlement. Finally, the scene expands to show wooden crane structures and villagers navigating the snowy paths of the village.
